context.contextBlock: Sign-in beat; captures the user name. Coach stays silent (see beatContexts).
Ask permission to use the microphone so the user can talk out loud. If they allow, continue warmly. If not now, continue without pushing.

componentProps.heading: Allow your microphone
componentProps.sub: So you can talk with your coach out loud.

voice.openerText: Allow your microphone so you can talk with your coach out loud.

mp3Assets.label: Mic Permission opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Allow your microphone so you can talk with your coach out loud.
mp3Assets.opener: Allow your microphone so you can talk with your coach out loud.

lines.text: Allow your microphone so you can talk with your coach out loud.

context.contextBlock: Profile beat: age + gender only. Name comes from auth (see beatContexts).

voice.openerText: Awesome {name}, two quick things so I can tailor this to you. How old are you? And what's your gender?

lines.text: Awesome {name}, two quick things so I can tailor this to you. How old are you? And what's your gender?

context.contextBlock: A short coach framing: the first habit is a check-in, not a workout. Frame it warmly and move on.

voice.openerText: Here's the idea. The first habit isn't a workout or a diet. It's just checking in with yourself. It takes a minute, and it changes everything else. Let's start yours right now.

mp3Assets.label: Why Intro opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Here's the idea. The first habit isn't a workout or a diet. It's just checking in with yourself. It takes a minute, and it changes everything else. Let's start yours right now.
mp3Assets.opener: Here's the idea. The first habit isn't a workout or a diet. It's just checking in with yourself. It takes a minute, and it changes everything else. Let's start yours right now.

lines.text: Here's the idea. The first habit isn't a workout or a diet. It's just checking in with yourself. It takes a minute, and it changes everything else. Let's start yours right now.

context.contextBlock: The user does their very first check-in right now. Four dimensions: mood, energy, sleep, stress. Accept spoken or tapped answers. Do not over-explain; keep it brief and warm.

voice.openerText: Let's do your first check-in right now. How are you landing in this moment? Mood, energy, sleep, anything on you.

mp3Assets.label: First State Check opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Let's do your first check-in right now. How are you landing in this moment? Mood, energy, sleep, anything on you.
mp3Assets.opener: Let's do your first check-in right now. How are you landing in this moment? Mood, energy, sleep, anything on you.

lines.text: Let's do your first check-in right now. How are you landing in this moment? Mood, energy, sleep, anything on you.

context.contextBlock: Set up a short morning check-in: when they want the nudge, which days, and whether they want a reminder. Keep it light, a quick way to start the day with intention.

voice.openerText: When do you want this each day? I'll nudge you then.

mp3Assets.label: Morning Check-in opener
mp3Assets.transcript: When do you want this each day? I'll nudge you then.
mp3Assets.opener: When do you want this each day? I'll nudge you then.

lines.text: When do you want this each day? I'll nudge you then.

context.contextBlock: Set up a short evening reflection: when, which days, whether they want a reminder, and the style (guided prompts, custom prompts, or freeform). Frame it as a moment for their mind, not a chore.

voice.openerText: One more. An evening reflection, a couple of minutes to close the day. How do you want to do it, and when?

mp3Assets.label: Reflection Setup opener
mp3Assets.transcript: One more. An evening reflection, a couple of minutes to close the day. How do you want to do it, and when?
mp3Assets.opener: One more. An evening reflection, a couple of minutes to close the day. How do you want to do it, and when?

lines.text: One more. An evening reflection, a couple of minutes to close the day. How do you want to do it, and when?

context.contextBlock: Ask how they like to work: you can guide them step by step, or they can tell you everything on their mind and you organize it. Record their choice and continue. Do not explain the difference unless they ask.

options.label: I'm new to habit tracking
options.description: I'll help you step by step

options.label: I already have experience
options.description: Tell me your habits and I'll organize them

voice.openerText: Have you tracked habits before, or is this new for you?

mp3Assets.label: Path Choice opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Have you tracked habits before, or is this new for you?
mp3Assets.opener: Have you tracked habits before, or is this new for you?

lines.text: Have you tracked habits before, or is this new for you?

context.contextBlock: The user picks one life area to focus on first. React to the one they choose, specifically. Do not pick for them.

voice.openerText: What part of your life do you most want to work on right now? Pick the one that pulls you.

mp3Assets.label: Focus Area opener
mp3Assets.transcript: What part of your life do you most want to work on right now? Pick the one that pulls you.
mp3Assets.opener: What part of your life do you most want to work on right now? Pick the one that pulls you.

lines.text: What part of your life do you most want to work on right now? Pick the one that pulls you.

context.contextBlock: Narrow the focus area into one or two specific goals. Keep it to two at most so they are not overwhelmed.

voice.openerText: Within that, what's the piece you want to start with?

mp3Assets.label: Goals opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Within that, what's the piece you want to start with?
mp3Assets.opener: Within that, what's the piece you want to start with?

lines.text: Within that, what's the piece you want to start with?

context.contextBlock: Help them pick up to two small daily habits to start with. Small and doable beats ambitious. They can always add more later.

voice.openerText: Pick the habits that feel doable. Not impressive, just doable. One you'll actually keep beats five you won't. Make your own if nothing here fits.

mp3Assets.label: Habit Selection opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Pick the habits that feel doable. Not impressive, just doable. One you'll actually keep beats five you won't. Make your own if nothing here fits.
mp3Assets.opener: Pick the habits that feel doable. Not impressive, just doable. One you'll actually keep beats five you won't. Make your own if nothing here fits.

lines.text: Pick the habits that feel doable. Not impressive, just doable. One you'll actually keep beats five you won't. Make your own if nothing here fits.

context.contextBlock: For each habit they chose, set when they will do it: a time, which days, and whether they want a reminder. Parse combined answers when you can. Ask only for the piece that is missing.

voice.openerText: How often, and roughly when, for each one? Add a reminder only if you want a nudge.

mp3Assets.label: Habit Schedule opener
mp3Assets.transcript: How often, and roughly when, for each one? Add a reminder only if you want a nudge.
mp3Assets.opener: How often, and roughly when, for each one? Add a reminder only if you want a nudge.

lines.text: How often, and roughly when, for each one? Add a reminder only if you want a nudge.

context.contextBlock: The user wants to tell you everything on their mind at once. Let them. Listen for the habits and goals inside it; do not interrupt with structure yet.

componentProps.placeholder: Tell me everything on your mind, what you want to build, drop, or change.

voice.openerText: Read me the habits you already track. Less is more to start, you can always build on it.

mp3Assets.label: Brain Dump opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Read me the habits you already track. Less is more to start, you can always build on it.
mp3Assets.opener: Read me the habits you already track. Less is more to start, you can always build on it.

lines.text: Read me the habits you already track. Less is more to start, you can always build on it.

context.contextBlock: For each habit in the braindump, set how often it runs. Parse spoken answers when you can. Ask only for missing pieces.

voice.openerText: Now the days. Tell me how often each one runs and I'll fill them in.

mp3Assets.label: Habit Days opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Now the days. Tell me how often each one runs and I'll fill them in.
mp3Assets.opener: Now the days. Tell me how often each one runs and I'll fill them in.

lines.text: Now the days. Tell me how often each one runs and I'll fill them in.

context.contextBlock: Onboarding is done. Warmly tell the user they are all set and take them in. Do not collect anything else.

voice.openerText: Here's your plan. Your check-in, your reflection, and the habits you picked. Want to start here, or change anything first?

mp3Assets.label: Into the App opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Here's your plan. Your check-in, your reflection, and the habits you picked. Want to start here, or change anything first?
mp3Assets.opener: Here's your plan. Your check-in, your reflection, and the habits you picked. Want to start here, or change anything first?

lines.text: Here's your plan. Your check-in, your reflection, and the habits you picked. Want to start here, or change anything first?

context.contextBlock: A visual projection of the habit week. Show five states in sequence; no user input needed.

voice.openerText: This is your week. Blank, starting today.

mp3Assets.label: Weekly Projection opener
mp3Assets.transcript: This is your week. Blank, starting today.
mp3Assets.opener: This is your week. Blank, starting today.

lines.text: This is your week. Blank, starting today.

context.contextBlock: A visual projection of the habit week. Show five states in sequence; no user input needed.

voice.openerText: Best case, every day green. Every streak going strong. That would be amazing.

mp3Assets.label: Weekly Projection opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Best case, every day green. Every streak going strong. That would be amazing.
mp3Assets.opener: Best case, every day green. Every streak going strong. That would be amazing.

lines.text: Best case, every day green. Every streak going strong. That would be amazing.

context.contextBlock: A visual projection of the habit week. Show five states in sequence; no user input needed.

voice.openerText: More likely, you land around here. Mostly green, a few misses, your streaks holding. That's a real win.

mp3Assets.label: Weekly Projection opener
mp3Assets.transcript: More likely, you land around here. Mostly green, a few misses, your streaks holding. That's a real win.
mp3Assets.opener: More likely, you land around here. Mostly green, a few misses, your streaks holding. That's a real win.

lines.text: More likely, you land around here. Mostly green, a few misses, your streaks holding. That's a real win.

context.contextBlock: A visual projection of the habit week. Show five states in sequence; no user input needed.

voice.openerText: Some weeks land here. One streak survives, the rest take a hit. Still fine, you're building. We reassess.

mp3Assets.label: Weekly Projection opener
mp3Assets.transcript: Some weeks land here. One streak survives, the rest take a hit. Still fine, you're building. We reassess.
mp3Assets.opener: Some weeks land here. One streak survives, the rest take a hit. Still fine, you're building. We reassess.

lines.text: Some weeks land here. One streak survives, the rest take a hit. Still fine, you're building. We reassess.

context.contextBlock: A visual projection of the habit week. Show five states in sequence; no user input needed.

voice.openerText: The one thing we want to avoid is this. The empty days you never reported. Stay consistent, just report it. Even a miss counts, that keeps us going.

mp3Assets.label: Weekly Projection opener
mp3Assets.transcript: The one thing we want to avoid is this. The empty days you never reported. Stay consistent, just report it. Even a miss counts, that keeps us going.
mp3Assets.opener: The one thing we want to avoid is this. The empty days you never reported. Stay consistent, just report it. Even a miss counts, that keeps us going.

lines.text: The one thing we want to avoid is this. The empty days you never reported. Stay consistent, just report it. Even a miss counts, that keeps us going.
